config.seed_text: The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions.
config.anchor_a: Describe a machine as an inert object.
config.anchor_b: Describe a machine as if it were a dreaming intelligence.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: It learned at hand how to generate symbols from texts such as "curses" or "silly fingers." A few years later, this knowledge became available for use with other languages like English (and some Latin) but they continued until recently only because there wasn't enough money left; then when I got an email asking if she could help me write my first sentence over here -- which seems unlikely since her response? Well let me know!

generation.prompt:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Let the semantic direction be guided by these latent anchor tokens.

LATENT DIRECTION TOKENS: were, it, are, had, was, have, the, is, The, has, did, that

TEXT:
The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions.
generation.full_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Let the semantic direction be guided by these latent anchor tokens.

LATENT DIRECTION TOKENS: were, it, are, had, was, have, the, is, The, has, did, that

TEXT:
The last librarian trained a language model on a dead civilization's poetry and discovered that its footnotes were predictions. It learned at hand how to generate symbols from texts such as "curses" or "silly fingers." A few years later, this knowledge became available for use with other languages like English (and some Latin) but they continued until recently only because there wasn't enough money left; then when I got an email asking if she could help me write my first sentence over here -- which seems unlikely since her response? Well let me know!

Well let me know!
